name: Grade Transfer AI (OneDrive)
description: Ingest a transcript PDF dropped in OneDrive, use the Anthropic Claude piece to extract the issuing country and the grades, resolve the matching scale via POST /scales/match (ranked by grade coverage), then run the transfer for the covered grades. If no scale can be confidently resolved, a needs-review JSON is uploaded instead. Backend calls are done with a CODE step (JS variant).
author: D E

input.prompt:
You are reading an academic transcript or diploma PDF issued by a non-Spanish university. Extract the following:
1. country: the country where the issuing institution is located, written as the official Spanish-language country name in UPPERCASE (e.g. United States -> ESTADOS UNIDOS DE AMERICA, Germany -> ALEMANIA, United Kingdom -> REINO UNIDO). If it is not explicitly stated, infer it from the institution, language or address.
2. grading_system: a short description of the grading scale used (e.g. 'US 4.0 GPA letter grades', 'German 1,0-5,0'), if identifiable; otherwise an empty string.
3. grade_type: 'numerico' if grades are numbers, 'literal' if letters or words, 'mixto' if both.
4. grades: every subject together with its grade. Copy the grade exactly as written, except normalise the decimal separator to a comma (3.7 -> 3,7) so it matches the reference dataset. Do not convert, round or translate the grade.

country.description: Issuing country as the official Spanish-language name in UPPERCASE (e.g. ALEMANIA, ESTADOS UNIDOS DE AMERICA)

grading_system.description: Short description of the grading scale used, if identifiable; otherwise an empty string

grades.description: All subjects and their grades found in the transcript

origin_grade.description: The grade exactly as written (decimal separator normalised to a comma)
